NVDA.title: BXM Wealth LLC Has $1.06 Million Stock Position in RTX Corporation $RTX
NVDA.summary: BXM Wealth LLC significantly reduced its stake in RTX Corporation by 91.1% in the first quarter, now holding 5,513 shares valued at $1.06 million. Despite this, other institutional investors like Vanguard Group and State Street Corp increased their holdings in RTX. The article also provides financial details, recent dividend announcements, analyst ratings, and a brief company profile for RTX.

NVDA.title: NVIDIA Corporation $NVDA is Banque Cantonale Vaudoise's 2nd Largest Position
NVDA.summary: Banque Cantonale Vaudoise notably increased its stake in NVIDIA (NVDA) by 4.3% in Q1, making it their second-largest holding, valued at $110.1 million. This increase follows NVIDIA's strong quarterly results, including exceeding EPS and revenue expectations and authorizing an $80 billion stock buyback. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for NVIDIA, citing positive AI partnership momentum despite potential volatility risks from export controls and chip-related probes.

NVDA.title: Market Minute: Inflation is rising, but bond yields are falling
NVDA.summary: Despite a headline inflation rate reduction, underlying core inflation in Australia increased, raising concerns for the RBA's interest rate decisions. However, interest rate expectations for an August hike have reduced, and Australian government bond yields continue to fall. While bonds are now considered fair value, equities, particularly technology stocks, appear expensive, with better opportunities in healthcare and consumer-related sectors.

NVDA.title: Does Rambus (RMBS) Joining Larger Russell Indexes Recast Its AI-Focused Investment Narrative?
NVDA.summary: Rambus Inc. has been moved from smaller Russell 2000 indexes to larger-cap Russell 1000 and Russell Midcap indexes, changing its institutional investor exposure. This shift does not alter Rambus's core business drivers in high-performance memory for AI and data centers but focuses attention on its ongoing reliance on DDR5 and AI-related memory cycles. The company's Q1 2026 results showed revenue of US$180.19 million, with management forecasting Q2 product revenue between US$95 million and US$101 million.

NVDA.title: QQQI ETF delivers strong monthly income and resilience amid market volatility, outperforming peers.
NVDA.summary: The NEOS Nasdaq-100 High Income ETF (QQQI) uses an option overlay strategy to generate high monthly income and has outperformed traditional covered call ETFs and risk-free assets since 2024. Despite recent tech sector downturns and market volatility, QQQI has maintained robust income distributions and recovered alongside the broader market. An analyst remains bullish on QQQI due to its attractive yield, structure, and upside potential for income-focused investors.

NVDA.title: BlackRock Flags Big AI Trade Beyond Nvidia, AMD, Micron
NVDA.summary: BlackRock is advising investors to look beyond traditional AI chipmakers like Nvidia, AMD, and Micron, and focus on the underlying energy infrastructure required to power the booming AI economy. The increasing demand for electricity by data centers, coupled with vulnerable energy supply, is making power generation and grid equipment a key investment theme. Companies like GE Vernova, Eaton Corporation, and Vistra Corp are identified as beneficiaries of this shift.

NVDA.title: Sony Group Corp Stock (SONY) Moved Up by 3.22% on Jun 29: A Full Analysis
NVDA.summary: Sony Group Corp (SONY) stock rose 3.22% on June 29, driven by investor optimism following management's commitment to profitable next-generation console pricing and potential expansion into portable gaming. Despite recent concerns over debt and layoffs, the company's diversified entertainment business, particularly Sony Pictures' global distribution deals, also contributed to positive sentiment. Technical indicators suggest a mixed outlook with a sell signal from MACD, but an oversold condition indicated by Williams %R.

MSFT.title: NVIDIA Corporation $NVDA is Banque Cantonale Vaudoise's 2nd Largest Position
MSFT.summary: Banque Cantonale Vaudoise notably increased its stake in NVIDIA (NVDA) by 4.3% in Q1, making it their second-largest holding, valued at $110.1 million. This increase follows NVIDIA's strong quarterly results, including exceeding EPS and revenue expectations and authorizing an $80 billion stock buyback. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for NVIDIA, citing positive AI partnership momentum despite potential volatility risks from export controls and chip-related probes.

MSFT.title: Crowdstrike CEO George Kurtz sells $2.2m in shares By Investing.com
MSFT.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. CEO George Kurtz sold over $2.2 million worth of Class A common stock across several transactions in late June 2026, executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. These sales occurred after a significant 58% surge in CrowdStrike shares over the past six months, bringing the stock near its 52-week high. Despite the sales, Kurtz maintains a substantial direct and indirect holding in the company, which recently reported strong quarterly earnings and expanded its AI security tools with AWS and other partners.

MSFT.title: Alphabet VP Marsida Saraci sells $153k of class C capital stock
MSFT.summary: Marsida Saraci, Alphabet's VP and Chief Accounting Officer, sold 449 shares of Class C Capital Stock totaling approximately $153,432, as part of a pre-planned trading plan. Additionally, 453 shares were disposed of to cover tax obligations from vested Google Stock Units. Following these transactions, Saraci holds 27,348 Class C shares and 3,660 Class A shares of Alphabet Inc.

MSFT.title: Alphabet Inc.(NasdaqGS: GOOG) dropped from Russell 1000 Value-Defensive Index
MSFT.summary: Alphabet Inc. (NasdaqGS: GOOG) has been removed from the Russell 1000 Value-Defensive Index. This decision was reported on June 29, 2026, by S&P Capital IQ. The article also provides a company profile, recent news, and analyst ratings for Alphabet Inc.

MSFT.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Stock Falls Amid Market Uptick: What Investors Need to Know
MSFT.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) stock closed down 1.18% on the most recent trading day, underperforming the broader S&P 500 which gained 1.18%. The company is anticipated to report an EPS of $4.21 and revenue of $87.46 billion in its upcoming financial release. Analysts have adjusted estimates, and Microsoft currently holds a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold), with a Forward P/E ratio of 21.53.

MSFT.title: WEC Energy Group (WEC) Following Data Center Demand Narrative And A Fair Value Question
MSFT.summary: WEC Energy Group (WEC) has seen its stock perform well, with significant returns over the past year and year-to-date, fueled by its role in meeting data center demand and substantial grid investments. While a narrative fair value estimates WEC to be slightly undervalued at $118.85 (compared to $124.19), its P/E ratio of 23.6x is above peers and its own fair ratio, suggesting limited room for error. The article encourages investors to analyze the full data set to weigh opportunities against risks, particularly regarding its $28 billion capital program and regulatory factors.

MSFT.title: Galaxy Digital joins Russell 1000 and Keel Infrastructure added to Russell 3000
MSFT.summary: Galaxy Digital (GLXY) has been included in the Russell 1000 Index, while Keel Infrastructure (KEEL) has been added to the Russell 3000 Index, reflecting their growing presence in the cryptocurrency and AI infrastructure sectors. This inclusion is expected to increase their visibility among institutional investors and passive investment products. Both companies are adapting former Bitcoin mining sites for high-density AI and HPC workloads, leveraging existing power infrastructure to meet rising demand.

MSFT.title: Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) Trading 9.1% Higher Following Analyst Upgrade
MSFT.summary: Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) saw its stock price jump by 9.1% following an analyst upgrade from Arete Research, which significantly raised its price target to $433 from $185 and maintained a Buy rating. This upgrade, along with positive revisions from other firms, contributes to a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $311.98 for the company. The cybersecurity firm also reported a strong Q3, with revenue increasing 31.1% year-over-year and EPS beating analyst estimates, though some insider selling has been noted.

GOOGL.title: Apollon Wealth Management LLC Has $9.47 Million Stock Position in Blackstone Inc. $BX
GOOGL.summary: Apollon Wealth Management LLC recently reduced its stake in Blackstone Inc. by 37.5%, selling 49,538 shares, but still holds 82,398 shares valued at $9.47 million. Despite the reduction, Blackstone reported robust Q1 earnings of $1.36 per share, surpassing estimates, and a 10% year-over-year revenue growth. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.16 per share, offering a 4.0% yield.

GOOGL.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL Shares Acquired by Apella Capital LLC
GOOGL.summary: Apella Capital LLC significantly increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 36.8% in the first quarter of 2026, bringing its total holdings to 51,958 shares valued at approximately $14.9 million. This acquisition aligns with a broadly positive sentiment on Wall Street, as several analysts have raised their price targets for Alphabet, which now holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $413.13. The company also reported strong quarterly results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.22 per share.

GOOGL.title: Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ:AVGO) Leads AI Chip Market Focus
GOOGL.summary: Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ:AVGO) is highlighted for its central role in the AI chip market due to strong demand for its products. The company's focus remains on AI chip development, data center expansion, and infrastructure software, which are key trends shaping the advanced computing market. This positioning allows Broadcom to stay at the forefront of technological advancements in the AI sector.

GOOGL.title: What Does the Russell 1000 Shift Mean for Valaris (NYSE:VAL)?
GOOGL.summary: This article discusses the implications of the Russell 1000 index shift for Valaris (NYSE:VAL), a provider of offshore contract drilling services. It highlights the company's operations, global energy projects, contract backlog, and how its classification within the Russell indexes is affected by the annual reconstitution process. The content provides a high-level overview of Valaris's business and its relevance to major market indices.
